description: FocalPoint-null Admin TO-DO List — for human oversight only. Completely separated from code project.

categories.human_oversight_required: Items requiring human admin review or approval

items.title: Initial system activation review
items.description: FocalPoint-null-00 has been bootstrapped for the first time. Admin should review: 1) PKI certificates generated for all agents in pki/, 2) .env configuration is correct, 3) ALLOW_AUTONOMOUS_ORGANIC_GROWTH flag is set intentionally, 4) Model credentials are configured correctly.
items.notes: Review config/.env.example and set .env before first run.

items.title: Define inter-agent communication protocol version
items.description: Establish a versioned protocol specification for all inter-agent messages brokered by FocalPoint-null-00. Current implementation uses JSON + RSA-2048 PKI signatures. Recommend formalising as a versioned schema in config/standards/.

items.title: Evaluate need for ReplayLog-Agent
items.description: Consider creating a dedicated ReplayLog-Agent to manage replay log generation, validation, and integration with FocalPoint-null checkpoint resume. Currently handled inline in checkpoint_manager.py. A dedicated agent would improve separation of concerns.

items.title: Rotate PKI master secret in production
items.description: The PKI_MASTER_SECRET in .env.example is a placeholder. Before any production use, this must be replaced with a cryptographically strong secret (32+ chars) preferably managed by an HSM or Azure Key Vault.
items.notes: See: NIST SP 800-57 for key management guidance.

ai_suggested_improvements.description: Post-smoke-test AI-evaluated feature and functional improvement suggestions. Each item includes the agent model that produced the suggestion.
ai_suggested_improvements.evaluation_trigger: Smoke Test PASS — 33 PASS / 0 FAIL / 1 WARN — 2026-03-09

items.title: Input Validation in WinForms
items.description: Forms including password fields and path inputs lack comprehensive validation. Implement validators for empty fields, path existence, regex patterns, and injection prevention in textbox inputs before processing.
items.notes: Security hardening — OWASP input validation best practices

items.title: JSON Schema Validation for Config Files
items.description: Config files lack JSON schema definitions. Create .schema.json files with $schema references and validate on load to catch config drift early.

items.title: Pester Unit Test Framework
items.description: Project has smoke tests but no Pester unit tests. Create tests/Modules.Tests.ps1 for PwShGUICore, AssistedSASC, SASC-Adapters modules with mock-based assertions and coverage tracking.
items.notes: Pester v5+ with -CodeCoverage; integrate into smoke test pipeline

items.title: Form Accessibility (Tab Order & Screen Reader)
items.description: WinForms GUI lacks accessibility features. Add Tab key navigation order, KeyDown handlers for keyboard shortcuts, screen-reader labels via AccessibleName/Description properties on all controls.

items.title: Centralized Secure Credential Prompt Handler
items.description: Create New-SecureCredentialDialog helper in PwShGUICore that uses [SecureString] internally, clears memory on close, and provides DPAPI encryption option. Replace ad-hoc password textboxes.
items.notes: CWE-316 cleartext credential storage in memory

items.title: Automated Config Backup Rotation
items.description: Add Initialize-ConfigBackupRotation to PwShGUICore that auto-backs up system-variables.xml daily, keeps last 30 days, exports to ZIP weekly.

items.title: Dependency Resolution CLI Tool
items.description: Create scripts/Invoke-DependencyResolution.ps1 to trace module-to-function-to-script dependencies and detect orphans. Output a force-directed graph JSON compatible with Dependency-Visualisation.html.

items.title: Real-time Log Viewer Panel
items.description: Add -ShowLiveLog toggle in Main-GUI Help menu that opens a real-time log tail form using FileSystemWatcher and RichTextBox with color-coded severity levels.

items.title: Script Execution Audit Log (Structured JSON)
items.description: Extend Write-AppLog to include user SID, privilege level, script hash (SHA256), and structured JSON entries for audit compliance. Supports forensic correlation.

items.title: Performance Baseline & Profiling Dashboard
items.description: Create Measure-AppStartupPerformance helper; log results to JSON; add Performance tab in Scan Dashboard to display startup time trends.

items.title: Health Check Dashboard (System Readiness)
items.description: Create scripts/Show-HealthDashboard.ps1 that tests disk space, module imports, config accessibility, network connectivity, logging permissions with color-coded status grid.

items.title: Extension Developer Guide
items.description: Create ~README.md/EXTENSION-DEVELOPER-GUIDE.md covering module architecture, adding custom menu items, button registration, logging conventions, form integration patterns.

items.title: Data Export Formats (CSV/JSON/HTML)
items.description: Test/scan reports lack export options. Add -ExportFormat parameter to Invoke-TestRoutine.ps1 and test runners; export to CSV/JSON/HTML with formatting.

items.title: Parameter Validation Framework
items.description: Create New-ValidatorSet helper in PwShGUICore that provides reusable templates for common parameter types (paths, versions, IPs, emails) and wraps ValidateSet/ValidateRange/ValidatePattern.

items.title: Hardcoded Path Elimination Audit
items.description: Paths like C:\PowerShellGUI appear in config examples and some scripts. Complete audit and replace with environment-driven values for deployment flexibility.

items.title: Async/Parallel Script Execution Helper
items.description: Create Invoke-ScriptAsync helper in PwShGUICore with job tracking UI, timeout handling, and cancellation token support. Replace manual Start-Job patterns.

items.title: Troubleshooting Flowchart with Mermaid Diagrams
items.description: Create ~README.md/TROUBLESHOOTING-FLOWCHART.md with mermaid diagrams for common issues: Script won't run -> check elevation/safety score/permissions decision trees.

items.title: Module Health Check Report Tool
items.description: Create Test-ModuleHealth in PwShGUICore: checks for orphaned functions, circular dependencies, missing help, syntax errors; output to HTML report.

items.title: Config Drift Detection & Auto-Recovery
items.description: Add Compare-ConfigIntegrity helper that checksums config files, detects unexpected changes, triggers automatic rollback to last good backup.

items.title: Script Preview Mode (Dry-Run Enhancement)
items.description: Add Show-ScriptPreviewDialog that parses a script to display affected files/paths/registry keys before execution. Enhances -WhatIf with visual preview.
